summary: Iteration 33 — Validated Import/Export with strict schema on Update Applicants Scores page. 14/14 backend pytest cases PASS in ~2m17s. Frontend flow on /update-scores fully exercised: Export XLSX (200), Export CSV (200), Import preview (200, modal shows 'Total: 2'), Confirm & Save (200 imported=2, batch_id returned, modal closes with success toast 'Imported 2 records (batch=610561d4)'). Schema strictly enforces 10 fixed columns + alphabetical round columns. Upsert prevents duplicates on re-import. Background worker '_worker_import_rejection_mailer' is running ('Import-rejection mailer worker started' present in backend log) and the Mongo query it uses correctly picks up isImported:true + status='Rejected' + import_rejection_notified:{$ne:true} test records. messaging.notify_rejected in TEST_MODE correctly re-routes recipient to rishi.nayak@blubridge.com / 9443109903.

minor.issue: SMTP authentication is FAILING: '535 5.7.8 Username and Password not accepted' — Gmail App Password (SMTP_PASSWORD='zfdb buxc ehyq gctr') is rejected by smtp.gmail.com:465 for hiring@blubridge.com. notify_rejected returns False (fail-soft), so worker still marks import_rejection_notified=True with import_rejection_send_ok=false. End users will NOT receive emails until SMTP credentials are refreshed. WhatsApp AiSensy also returns 401 (already noted as known mocked).

export: GET /api/bb/export-scores?format=csv → 200, text/csv, header order correct, rows>0
import_preview: Valid XLSX with rounds 'BA' + 'Accounts1' (unsorted on input) → 200, total=2, round_columns=['Accounts1','BA'] (alphabetical), errors=[], scores parsed
Empty score for a round column → row parses with that round skipped (no error)
Missing required column ('Status' dropped) → 400 with detail mentioning missing columns
CSV upload parses identically to XLSX
Non-numeric score adds errors[] entry but still returns 200 with both rows in output
import_confirm: POST /api/bb/import-scores/confirm persists docs to bb_applicant_updates with isImported:true, import_batch_id (UUID), imported_at (ISO), import_rejection_notified:false
All fields preserved: status, scores, name, phone, job_role
Re-import with same email upserts (count stays 1, batch_id updates, name/status overwritten)
round_trip: Export XLSX → re-upload to /import-scores/preview → 200, no missing-columns error, round_columns alphabetical
worker_and_messaging: Backend log contains 'Import-rejection mailer worker started' AND '[CutoffGuard] MESSAGING_CUTOFF_TS=...'
DB simulation query {isImported:true, status:'Rejected', import_rejection_notified:{$ne:true}} successfully retrieves a freshly imported test record
Direct call messaging.notify_rejected(...) in TEST_MODE re-routes recipient to rishi.nayak@blubridge.com / 9443109903 (verified via [TEST_MODE] Overriding recipient log line)
frontend: Login as Admin User / Admin User succeeds; navigation to /update-scores renders [data-testid='update-scores-page']
Upload XLSX via [data-testid='import-btn'] triggers POST /api/bb/import-scores/preview → 200; [data-testid='import-preview-modal'] opens; [data-testid='import-preview-count'] shows 'Total: 2'
Click [data-testid='import-confirm-btn'] triggers POST /api/bb/import-scores/confirm → 200 {imported:2, batch_id:<uuid>}; modal closes; success toast 'Imported 2 records (batch=...)' visible

action_items: FIX SMTP CREDENTIALS — hiring@blubridge.com is failing Gmail auth (535 BadCredentials). Imported rejected applicants will silently NOT receive email until this is renewed. Refresh Google App Password and update SMTP_PASSWORD in /app/backend/.env.
Optionally: surface import_rejection_send_ok=false in an admin UI so operators see when the 7 PM batch fail-softs.
critical_code_review_comments: bb_modules.py line 807-809: filter logic `match['schedule_date'] = {**match.get('schedule_date', {}), '$gte': startDate}` overwrites the existing `{'$nin':[None,''],'$exists':True}` constraint when the spread produces a $gte/$lte-only dict. The $nin/$exists guards are LOST when startDate or endDate is supplied. Confirmed by the test (filtered query returns rows correctly because $gte/$lte naturally exclude empty/null strings, but technically the $nin/$exists guard silently disappears). Recommend: build the date constraint dict separately, then merge: `match['schedule_date'] = {'$nin':[None,''], '$exists':True, '$gte':startDate, '$lte':endDate}`.

bg_workers.py line 412: the `if not (now.hour == 19 and now.minute < 30)` guard combined with `await asyncio.sleep(min(wait_s, 3600))` means the worker can be late by up to ~1 hour after 19:00 UTC if it is early in the day. Acceptable for daily mail but worth noting.

bb_modules.py /import-scores/confirm — does not validate `phone` length / format before upsert. Garbage phone strings will be persisted and later attempted by AiSensy WhatsApp. Add a defensive normalization (strip non-digits, last 10) similar to verify_applicant_otp.

bb_modules.py /import-scores/preview line 674: `Status` field defaults to 'On hold' when blank — silently masks data quality issues. Consider adding to errors[] when blank, so the user sees on the preview screen.
bb_modules.py is now 1299 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into bb_imports.py, bb_holidays.py, bb_otp.py.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (export xlsx/csv + import preview/confirm flow on /update-scores fully working)

seed_data_creation: Created 5 test docs in bb_applicant_updates (emails matching test_iter33*) during testing. ALL CLEANED UP at end via direct Mongo delete_many({'email':{'$regex':'test_iter33'}}) — verified 0 docs remain.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter33 introduced strict schema Import/Export at /api/bb/export-scores and /api/bb/import-scores/{preview,confirm}. Schema headers (exact order): Name, Schedule Date, College, Degree, Course, Year of Graduation, Email, Phone, Job Role, Status, then round columns alphabetical. Imported docs in bb_applicant_updates are tagged isImported:true + import_batch_id (UUID) + import_rejection_notified:false. The 7 PM UTC worker `_worker_import_rejection_mailer` (bg_workers.py:395) only fires 19:00–19:30 UTC daily. SMTP is currently broken (535 BadCredentials on hiring@blubridge.com app password) — emails fail-soft in worker. Test command: `MONGO_URL='...' DB_NAME=hr_analytics REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://applicant-details.preview.emergentagent.com pytest backend/tests/test_iteration33_import_export.py -v`. Cleanup: `db.bb_applicant_updates.delete_many({email: /test_iter33/})`.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp AiSensy: Returns 401 — fail-soft in worker, record still flagged
mocked_apis.SMTP Gmail: Returns 535 BadCredentials currently — REAL ISSUE, not mocked. Needs credential refresh.
